# Medbridge

> Medbridge is a healthcare market-access and logistics company headquartered in Hong Kong, supporting medical device and healthcare manufacturers across Hong Kong, Singapore, Malaysia and Thailand.

## What Medbridge Does

Medbridge helps healthcare manufacturers enter and operate across four Asian markets through one coordinated regional platform. Services span the complete market-entry pathway: regulatory registration, in-market representation, licence holding, Importer of Record, healthcare third-party logistics, inventory management, last-mile delivery and selected commercial market-access services.

Primary brand line: **Market Access. Made Simple.**

## Markets

- **Hong Kong** — Regional headquarters and central coordination hub
- **Singapore** — Regulatory and logistics gateway for Southeast Asia (HSA framework)
- **Malaysia** — Public and private healthcare market access (MDA framework)
- **Thailand** — Medical tourism and healthcare hub (Thai FDA framework)

## Core Services

- Regulatory Market Entry — device classification, dossier review, registration submissions, authority communication, renewals
- In-Market Representation — local authorised representation, Local Responsible Person coordination, registration-holder services
- Licence Holding — distributor-independent registration structures where permitted under local regulations
- Importer of Record — import permits, customs documentation, clearance coordination, traceability
- Healthcare 3PL — goods receiving, lot/batch/serial tracking, expiry management, pick-and-pack, consignment management, returns
- Last-Mile Logistics — scheduled delivery to hospitals, clinics and laboratories; proof of delivery; returns collection
- Commercial Market Access — market assessment, distributor search, tender support, launch planning (contracted separately)

## Healthcare Specialities

General Medical Devices · Ophthalmology · Dentistry and Maxillofacial Surgery · Medical Aesthetics and Dermatology · Orthopaedics and Rehabilitation · Diagnostics and Laboratory

## Key Positioning

- Hong Kong-headquartered regional platform
- One regional contact across four markets
- Regulatory, importation and logistics integrated under one relationship
- Manufacturer control preserved — flexible registration structures where legally permitted
- Asset-light model using qualified local entities and approved service partners
- Healthcare-specialist quality framework

## What Medbridge Does Not Claim

- Guaranteed regulatory approvals or fixed authority timelines
- Guaranteed customs clearance
- Owned warehouses in every market (coordinated through qualified logistics partners)
- Cold-chain or pharmaceutical logistics capability unless separately confirmed
- Operations outside Hong Kong, Singapore, Malaysia and Thailand at this stage
